items.title: A night of extreme highs and lows as Real Madrid learn Benfica lessons
items.summary: Vinícius Júnior's stunning winner was followed by a 10-minute stoppage when the Madrid star accused Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni of racially abusing him and the referee invoked UEFA's anti-racism protocol.

items.title: 'Defamation campaign' against Prestianni - Benfica
items.summary: Benfica claim there is a "defamation campaign" against Gianluca Prestianni after Uefa launched an investigation into claims he racially abused Real Madrid winger Vinicius Jr.

items.title: FC Eindhoven mist basisspeler voor drie wedstrijden door oproep Jamaica Onder-20
items.summary: FC Eindhoven kan voorlopig even geen beroep doen op Marlon van de Wetering. Niet door een blessure, maar omdat de achttienjarige verdediger is opgeroepen voor Jamaica Onder-20.

items.title: Jim Ratcliffe’s shameless comments signal soccer’s turn toward total Trumpism | Leander Schaerlaeckens
items.summary: What made the Manchester United co-owner’s anti-immigrant screed so revolting was his brazen willingness to say it all out loud. Remind you of anyone? Did British petrochemicals billionaire and Manchester United’s controlling minority owner, Sir Jim Ratcliffe, really mean it when he proclaimed to Sky News that “the UK is being colonized by immigrants”? Is Ratcliffe simply a gutter racist or actually making a cynical political play that may redound to his benefit down the line when Britain faces down yet another period of political upheaval as the country’s old factions continue to fracture? There’s reasonable debate to be had there. Continue reading...

items.title: Vinícius racism allegation prompts UEFA probe
items.summary: UEFA will investigate the racism allegations made by Vinícius Júnior in Real Madrid's game against Benfica.

items.title: Mbappé: 'I heard' racist abuse of Vinícius Júnior
items.summary: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappé is demanding that action be taken against Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni, alleging he racially abused Vinícius Júnior.

items.title: Balogun double sets U.S. mark in UCL knockouts
items.summary: American forward Folarin Balogun took less than one minute to give Monaco the lead against Paris Saint-Germain in their Champions League playoff on Tuesday.

items.title: Van Dijk backs Szoboszlai as Liverpool 'leader'
items.summary: Virgil van Dijk believes midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai has all the qualities to one day succeed him as Liverpool captain having led by example this season.

items.title: T20 World Cup: Pakistan win secures Super 8s spot in with England, Sri Lanka, NZ
items.summary: Sahibzada Farhan smashed his first international T20 century and Usman Tariq confused Namibia with his mystery spin as Pakistan secured a Super 8s spot at the T20 World Cup with a 102-run win on Wednesday.

items.title: 'Spurs moet gaan beseffen dat ze in een degradatiestrijd verwikkeld zijn'
items.summary: Les Ferdinand luidt de noodklok voor Tottenham Hotspur. De oud-speler van de club, die meer dan 150 keer scoorde op het hoogste niveau van Engeland, is van mening dat de club serieus moet vrezen voor degradatie. Volgens de supercomputer van Opta is de kans op degradatie nog altijd 'maar' 3,4 procent, maar Ferdinand maakt zich zorgen. 'Niemand kijkt je nog raar aan als je vraagt of ze gaan degraderen.'

items.title: Prijzengeld Conference League: dit kan AZ verdienen de rest van het toernooi
items.summary: AZ is de enige nog overgebleven Nederlandse ploeg in Europa. De Alkmaarders hopen hoge ogen te gooien in de Conference League. De prijzenpot in het derde Europese toernooi ligt aanzienlijk lager dan in de Champions en Europa League. Toch strijdt AZ om de nodige miljoenen.

items.title: FIA propose mid-season rule change amid engine controversy
items.summary: The FIA have proposed a mid-season rule change to its engine regulations with a vote set to take place before the Australian Grand Prix.

items.title: FC Dordrecht legt 'buitenkansje' Mica Pinto (32) vast
items.summary: FC Dordrecht heeft woensdagmiddag de komst van Mica Pinto wereldkundig gemaakt. De 32-jarige linksback komt transfervrij naar de huidige nummer zeven van de Keuken Kampioen Divisie.

items.title: Bayern gaat rustige transferzomer tegemoet: 'Spaarrekening wordt kleiner en kleiner'
items.summary: Bayern München-fans die hopen op een aantal transferknallers komende zomer, mogen hun verwachtingen naar beneden bijstellen. Uli Hoeness, lid van Bayerns raad van commissarissen, heeft uitgesloten dat de topclub zich enorm zal roeren in de spelershandel.

items.title: Ukraine officials to boycott Winter Paralympics in protest over Russia’s participation
items.summary: Ukrainian officials will boycott next month's Milano Cortina Winter Paralympics over the participation of ​Russian and Belarusian ‌athletes who have been cleared ​to compete under their flags.

items.title: 'I'm more connected with this car' - Hamilton 'really excited' for new F1 season
items.summary: Lewis Hamilton says he feels "more connected" to Ferrari's 2026 car than its predecessor and that he is "really excited" to see what the team can achieve this season.

items.title: Mourinho accused of gaslighting for response to Vinícius’ allegation of racism
items.summary: Benfica manager strongly criticised by Kick It Out Uefa investigating Real Madrid player’s claims The anti-discrimination charity Kick It Out has accused José Mourinho of gaslighting for his response to Vinícius Júnior’s allegations of racist abuse. Vinícius reported that he was racially abused by Benfica’s Gianluca Prestianni during Real Madrid’s Champions League playoff first leg. On Wednesday, Uefa said it would “investigate allegations of discriminatory behaviour”. Mourinho, the Benfica manager, has been heavily criticised for appearing to suggest Vinícius had provoked the abuse with his celebration after scoring the only goal early in the second half. Continue reading...

items.title: Olympic skiing legend Ryding: 'I won't be racing in anger again'
items.summary: Winter Olympian Dave Ryding reached the end of piste in Bormio on Monday as he placed 17th in the men's slalom in his fifth and final Games.

items.title: Howe wants players to 'step up' - is this Ramsey's time to shine?
items.summary: Eddie Howe has called on his Newcastle players to continue to "step up" in Bruno Guimaraes' absence - is this Jacob Ramsey's time to shine?

items.title: 'Rudderless Aberdeen face kryptonite club as they bid to save season'
items.summary: Without a manager while languishing in eighth place in the Scottish Premiership, Aberdeen's season rests on their Scottish Cup last-16 tie with Motherwell.
